source_ranges.source:
class DashboardServer:
    host: str
    port: int
    base_url: str
    _httpd: DashboardHttpServer
    _thread: threading.Thread

    def shutdown(self) -> None:

def shutdown(self) -> None:
        self._httpd.shutdown()
        self._httpd.server_close()
        self._thread.join(timeout=5)
